message:
fix(command): classify MSETNX, BRPOPLPUSH, BZPOPMIN/MAX, BZMPOP, and ZDIFFSTORE as write commands

Add 6 missing commands to the is_write_command classification:
MSETNX, BRPOPLPUSH, BZPOPMIN, BZPOPMAX, BZMPOP, and ZDIFFSTORE.
These mutating and blocking-with-side-effect commands were previously
not classified as writes, which could affect replication routing.
Add dedicated test covering all variants (both upper and lowercase).
Normalize rustfmt formatting in store PubSubMessage and test functions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
